shots.title: OB1Adapter implementing HarnessAdapter interface
shots.notes: Full adapter with {output, error} protocol, per-event hook scripts, OB1 tool mappings, detection via .ob1/hooks/. Reviewed by harness engineer sub-agent before implementation — 3 critical findings addressed.

shots.title: Registry + barrel registration, init --ob1, doctor MCP check
shots.notes: Added ob1 to HarnessId, ADAPTER_PRIORITY, adapters barrel. Added --ob1 flag to init, MCP config installer, doctor MCP path. Fixed all MCP installers to preserve existing slope entries.

shots.title: Test suite for OB1Adapter + init MCP tests
shots.notes: 36 adapter tests + 4 init-mcp tests. Covers format output, hook generation, installGuards, detect, toolNames, MCP preserve behavior.

conditions: First sprint executed in OB1 terminal tool
Adapter engineer sub-agent review caught 3 critical issues pre-implementation
special_plays: MCP preserve fix applied across all 5 existing adapters as bonus improvement
yardage_book_updates: OB1 uses {output, error} protocol — not {decision, reason, context} like Cursor
OB1 hooks live at ~/.ob1 globally but .ob1/hooks at project level for detection
slope init auto-detect can't find OB1 until hooks are installed (chicken-and-egg) — use --ob1 flag
course_management_notes: All 3 tickets clean — no hazards, no penalties, no reverts
Sub-agent review workflow (plan → review → fix → implement) caught protocol mismatch before writing code
MCP installer overwrite bug discovered during verification — fixed across all adapters
slope_factors: Established adapter pattern made implementation straightforward (slope 1)
Cline adapter was the closest reference for per-event script generation
Cursor adapter was closest for JSON protocol structure
